title: Lymph Node Swelling Relief for Organ Transplant Recipients: 9 Herbal Creams
description: Solidago virgaurea creams, also known as goldenrod, contain properties that may help alleviate lymph node swelling. The creams contain flavonoids and terpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. These compounds may help reduce swelling and pain by blocking the production of inflammatory chemicals in the body.
